svg.font-family: Inter, Segoe UI, Helvetica Neue, sans-serif
svg.text: 1280 logic cells · each = 1 LUT4 + 1 CARRY + 1 FF
LUT4 + CARRY + FF, with a dedicated carry-in/out wire

g.text: tiny SRAM. 16 config bits = any 4-input function.
fixed adder helper. cin/cout bypass routing — fast chain.

svg.text: yosys reports SB_LUT4 and SB_CARRY separately — same chip resource, distinct primitives, distinct counts
